__fixture__.name: entry_row_open_workspace_palette
__fixture__.scenario: User invokes Open Workspace from the command palette. The palette emits one entry_chooser_row_record with entry_chooser_row_kind = workspace, entry_chooser_surface_class = command_palette, entry_verb_candidate = open, target_kind_candidates = [workspace_manifest, workset_manifest], resulting_mode_candidates = [workspace_with_roots, workset_slice], trust_posture_class = trust_pending_until_admission, profile_default_class = sticky_for_target_or_default. Demonstrates §3 verb matrix (open row), §4.7 row-kind binding rule 1 (workspace row + open verb), §6 invariant 3 (palette row matches Start Center row across the same seven verb-bound fields).
